alt: Black-and-white photograph of Lima Plaza de Armas with palm trees framing the Cathedral of Lima twin towers, a stone fountain at center, and people on benches in the foreground
description: Early-twentieth-century photograph of the Plaza de Armas (Plaza Mayor) in Lima, Peru, showing the twin-tower Cathedral of Lima, the central fountain of 1650, palm trees, and ornate cast-iron lamp posts. Library of Congress reproduction cph.3c08423.
photographer: Unknown; Library of Congress Prints & Photographs Division (cph collection)
title: Cathedral in the Plaza de Armas, Lima, Peru
